popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: AKA Thomas de Montacute, fourth earl of Salisbury, soldier, was the elder son of John Montagu, third earl of Salisbury and his wife, Maud Montagu (d. 1424), daughter of Adam Fraunceys, mayor of London …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Montagu於1388年3月25日出生時，他的父親John de Montagu38歲，母親Maud Francis26歲。他於1399年5月23日與Eleanor Holland結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1409年住在英國波克夏。他於1414年登記服兵役。他去世於1428年11月3日在法國崔洛易特姆-素-洛易享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Montagu于1388年3月25日出生时，他的父亲John de Montagu38岁，母亲Maud Francis26岁。他于1399年5月23日与Eleanor Holland结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1409年住在英国波克夏。他于1414年登记服兵役。他去世于1428年11月3日在法国崔洛易特姆-素-洛易享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Montagu was born on 25 March 1388, his father, John de Montagu, was 38 and his mother, Maud Francis, was 26. He married Eleanor Holland on 23 May 1399. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He lived in Berkshire, England in 1409. He registered for military service in 1414. He died on 3 November 1428, in Meung-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, France, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Montagu est né le 25 mars 1388, son père, John de Montagu, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maud Francis, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Holland le 23 mai 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il a vécu à Berkshire, Angleterre en 1409. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1414. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1428, à Meung-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, France, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Montagu am 25. März 1388 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Montagu 38 und seine Mutter Maud Francis 26. Er hat am 23. Mai 1399 Eleanor Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1409 hat er in Berkshire, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1414 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 3. November 1428 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Meung-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Montagu è nato il il 25 marzo 1388, il suo padre, John de Montagu, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Maud Francis, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Holland il 23 maggio 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Berkshire, England nel 1409. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1414. Morì il 3 novembre 1428, nel Meung-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, Francia, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Montaguが1388年3月25日に生まれた時，父John de Montaguは38歳，母Maud Francisは26歳であった。1399年5月23日にEleanor Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年にはイギリスバークシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1414年に兵役登録をした。彼は1428年11月3日にフランスセントアロイアーエトメウング-スル-ロイアーで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Montagu(이)가 1388년 3월 25일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Montagu(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Francis(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1399년 5월 23일 Eleanor Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1409년도에 영국 버크실르에서 살았다. 그는 1414년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1428년 11월 3일 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 우그-수-로이르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.25 March 1388–3 November 1428: 1388 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 25–1428 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 3
mn.Cirencester, , Gloucestershire, England: Cirencester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.25 March 1388–3 November 1428: 25 de março de 1388–3 de novembro de 1428
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Montagu nasceu em 25 de março de 1388, seu pai, John de Montagu, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud Francis, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Holland em 23 de maio de 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele viveu em Berkshire, Inglaterra em 1409. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1414. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1428, em Meung-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, França, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Montagu родился 25 марта 1388 г., его отцу по имени John de Montagu было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Francis, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Holland 23 мая 1399 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он жил в местности биркшир, Англия в 1409 году. В 1414 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 3 ноября 1428 г. в местности меунг-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентр, Франция в возрасте 40 лет.

es.25 March 1388–3 November 1428: 25 de marzo de 1388–3 de noviembre de 1428
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Montagu nació el 25 de marzo de 1388, su papá, John de Montagu, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Maud Francis, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eleanor Holland el 23 de mayo de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Berkshire, Inglaterra en 1409. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1414. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1428, en Meung-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 40 años.
